initial_dialogue_state_list: You want to request a special meal accommodation on the train for 4 people due to dietary restrictions.
You want to book a private dining room in the expensive restaurant in the east for 4 people at 16:30 on Wednesday.
You want to request a car service to pick you up from the train station in Norwich after arrival by 21:30 on Wednesday.
